heading: Payments to Humphrey Institute and Dirksen Center; procedures applicable
label: 2568 Payments to Humphrey Institute and Dirksen Center; procedures applicable
text: No payment may be made under sections 2566 to 2569 of this title except upon an application at such time, in such manner, and containing or accompanied by such information as the Secretary may require.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1978section 4(d) of Pub. L. 95–270section 2566 of this title

Transfer of Functions“Secretary”, meaning Secretary of Education, substituted in text for “Commissioner” pursuant to sections 301(a)(1) and 507 of , which are classified to sections 3441(a)(1) and 3507 of this title and which transferred functions of Commissioner of Education to Secretary of Education.Pub. L. 96–88
